service_name.title: Service name
service_name.description: A human-readable name for this configuration profile.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: A longer multi-line description of what this service does.

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: Secret credential used to authenticate with the upstream service.

max_retries.title: Max retries
max_retries.description: How many times to retry a failed request. Lower bound only, so this renders as a number input.

timeout_seconds.title: Timeout
timeout_seconds.description: Request timeout. Bounded on both ends, so this is inferred as a slider.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Master switch. When off, the target channel below is disabled by a rule.

features.title: Enabled features
features.description: Pick any number of features. Inferred as a checklist from an array of enum strings.

log_level.title: Log level
log_level.description: A static enum, inferred as a select.

target_channel.title: Target channel
target_channel.description: Loader-driven select. Options come from the example.loadChannels loader.

start_date.title: Start date
start_date.description: A calendar date. Inferred as a date control from format: date.

run_at.title: Run at
run_at.description: A full timestamp. Inferred as a datetime control from format: date-time.

quiet_hours_start.title: Quiet hours start
quiet_hours_start.description: A time of day. Inferred as a time control from format: time.

active_window.title: Active window
active_window.description: A date range. Explicit x-cf type: daterange (not inferred).

accent_color.title: Accent color
accent_color.description: Theme accent. Inferred as a color control from format: color.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Free-form tags. Inferred as a taglist from an array of plain strings.

config_path.title: Config file path
config_path.description: Filesystem path. Explicit x-cf type: filepath (not inferred).

startup_script.title: Startup script
startup_script.description: A snippet of code. Explicit x-cf type: code (not inferred).

cat_image.title: Cat of the day
cat_image.description: A custom plugin control (cat.image) that renders an from cataas.com.

maintenance_windows.title: Maintenance windows
maintenance_windows.description: A complex composite plugin control (schedule.weekly): an array of weekly windows, each with a label, an enabled toggle, and a Mon-Sun day picker.

service_name.tooltip: The display name for this profile. Required.

max_retries.tooltip: Number of retry attempts. Has a minimum but no maximum, so it stays a number input.

timeout_seconds.tooltip: Drag the slider between 1 and 120 seconds.

enabled.tooltip: Toggle the whole service on or off.

features.tooltip: Tick the features you want enabled.

log_level.tooltip: Choose how verbose logging should be.

target_channel.tooltip: Loaded at runtime from the example plugin. Disabled while the service is off.

start_date.tooltip: When the service should start running.

run_at.tooltip: Exact timestamp of the next run.

quiet_hours_start.tooltip: Time of day when notifications go silent.

active_window.tooltip: The date span during which the service is active.

config_path.tooltip: Absolute path to the config file on disk.

startup_script.tooltip: A shell snippet run on startup.

cat_image.tooltip: A fresh cat, served by the external Showcase plugin via cataas.com.

maintenance_windows.tooltip: Composite control from the external Showcase plugin. Each row is a weekly window with a label, an enabled toggle and a Mon-Sun day picker; use Enable all / Disable all / Add group to manage them.

Cat Gallery.description: A custom plugin control showing cats.
